svg.title: NCR Ride Analysis — project architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end flowchart from raw CSV input through six analysis phases to final outputs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What columns are in ncr_ride_bookings_cleaned.csv?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Phase 1: Data Loading and Understanding?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Phase 2: Data Cleaning?')
g.text: datetime parse · feature engineering · null audit · dtypes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What new time features are derived in Phase 2?')
sendPrompt('What EDA visualisations are made in Phase 3?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the booking status distribution chart')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the vehicle type and revenue chart')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the hourly demand chart')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the ratings distribution chart')
sendPrompt('What are the 10 business questions answered in Phase 4?')
g.text: peak hours · revenue · cancellations · payments · ratings

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the answer to Q1: peak hours?')
sendPrompt('What is the answer to Q3: vehicle revenue?')
sendPrompt('What is the answer to Q5 and Q6: cancellation reasons?')
sendPrompt('What is the answer to Q7: monthly trends?')
sendPrompt('What is the answer to Q9: ratings by vehicle?')
sendPrompt('What is the answer to Q10: distance vs fare?')
sendPrompt('What future ML work is suggested in Phase 5?')
g.text: demand forecasting · cancel prediction · dynamic pricing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the key conclusions and recommendations in Phase 6?')
sendPrompt('What is in the Jupyter notebook output?')
sendPrompt('What does the cleaned CSV output contain?')
sendPrompt('What is in the README file?')
